repo_notes.content: Current app state: Vite + React single-page app with React Router navigation. The UI now has a navbar and two routed pages (`/` and `/hello`) rather than a single static App component.

pages.title: Project Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to `hello-world-app`, including stack (Vite, React, React Router), dev workflow scripts, and how the app is composed.

page_notes.content: Primary scripts in package.json: dev, build, lint, preview.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: How to install dependencies and run the app locally with `npm install` and `npm run dev`, plus production build and preview commands.

page_notes.content: Dependencies include react, react-dom, and react-router-dom.

pages.title: Repository Structure
pages.purpose: Explains the key top-level files and directories: `src/`, `public/`, `index.html`, `vite.config.js`, and `eslint.config.js`.

pages.title: Application Source Code
pages.purpose: Overview of source layout and render flow from `src/main.jsx` into `src/App.jsx`, then routed page components.

pages.title: Application Entry Point (main.jsx)
pages.purpose: Documents `src/main.jsx` bootstrapping: `createRoot`, mounting into `#root`, and wrapping `App` with `StrictMode`.

page_notes.content:
The HTML mount target is defined in `index.html` as `
`.

pages.title: Root Component and Routing (App.jsx)
pages.purpose: Explains `src/App.jsx` as the app shell: BrowserRouter setup, `Navbar` rendering, and route mapping for `/` -> `Home` and `/hello` -> `HelloWorld`.

page_notes.content: Uses inline flex styles for full-height layout and centered page content.

pages.title: Navbar Component (components/Navbar.jsx)
pages.purpose: Documents navigation links and header styling. `Link` components provide client-side navigation to Home and Hello World pages.

page_notes.content: Rendered at the top of App shell so it is visible on all routes.

pages.title: Home Page (pages/Home.jsx)
pages.purpose: Describes route `/` content and current placeholder copy used for the Home page body.

page_notes.content: Simple presentational component with centered text.

pages.title: Hello World Page (pages/HelloWorld.jsx)
pages.purpose: Describes route `/hello` content and current scaffold-style greeting copy.

page_notes.content: Simple presentational component with centered text.

pages.title: Build Toolchain
pages.purpose: Overview of Vite-powered development and production builds, including React Fast Refresh support.

pages.title: Vite Configuration (vite.config.js)
pages.purpose: Explains the `defineConfig` setup and React plugin registration used by dev server and build pipeline.

pages.title: Code Quality and Linting
pages.purpose: Overview of ESLint use in the project and rule coverage for JS/JSX React files.

page_notes.content: Lint command is available as `npm run lint`.

pages.title: ESLint Configuration (eslint.config.js)
pages.purpose: Describes flat config setup, recommended JS rules, React Hooks and React Refresh plugin integration, and `dist` ignore behavior.

pages.title: Static Assets and HTML Shell
pages.purpose: Covers `public/vite.svg` favicon and `index.html` SPA shell with root mount and module script entry.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.purpose: Defines core project terms for onboarding (SPA shell, route, BrowserRouter, StrictMode, Fast Refresh).

page_notes.content: Keep this page updated as architecture grows.
